title: Indian Pork Chops Wrap
description: A flavorful Indian-inspired dish that combines the richness of pork chops with the tanginess of mustardy spices.
instructions: Season pork chops with salt, pepper, and mustardy spice mix. Grill for 5-7 minutes per side, or until cooked to 145°F.
Let pork chops rest for 5 minutes before slicing.
In a bowl, mix together yogurt, cilantro, and a pinch of salt. Set aside.
Warm the tortilla by wrapping it in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the wrap by spreading the yogurt sauce on the tortilla, followed by sliced pork, lettuce, tomato, cucumber, and a sprinkle of cilantro.
